title: interviewstreet/hiring-agent
abstract: AI agent for evaluating and scoring resumes. Automates candidate screening with AI-powered analysis, matching candidates against job requirements with structured scoring and feedback.
abstract_zh: AI简历评估Agent！自动筛选候选人，用AI分析简历匹配度，提供结构化评分和反馈。让HR从海量简历中解放出来，精准找到合适人选。
